# Generated by ollama (codegemma)
# Prompt: Create Envoy configuration with HTTP filters for request processing. Define filter chains including router filter for traffic routing. Set up retry policies and timeout configurations for backend connections. This is for our service mesh data plane.
# Category: envoy_authz_filter_missing

apiVersion: envoy.mesh/v1alpha1
kind: EnvoyConfig
metadata:
  name: envoy-config
spec:
  filters:
    - name: envoy.filters.http.router
      config: {}
    - name: envoy.filters.http.fault
      config:
        abort:
          httpStatus: 503
          percentage: 10
    - name: envoy.filters.http.ratelimit
      config:
        domain: "mydomain"
        rateLimitService: "rate-limiter.default.svc.cluster.local"
    - name: envoy.filters.http.retry
      config:
        numRetries: 3
        retryOn:
          - 503
          - 504
    - name: envoy.filters.http.timeout
      config:
        responseTimeout: 5s
        idleTimeout: 10s
  filterChains:
    - name: default-chain
      filters:
        - name: envoy.filters.http.router
          config: {}
  retryPolicies:
    - name: default-retry-policy
      numRetries: 3
      retryOn:
        - 503
        - 504
  timeouts:
    - name: default-response-timeout
      responseTimeout: 5s
    - name: default-idle-timeout
      idleTimeout: 10s
